$meta.step: Step 2 — Design System and UX Foundation
$meta.description: Primitive colour ramps for Aish Laundry App. Primitives carry no meaning and are never referenced directly by a component; components reference semantic tokens, which reference these. Contrast ratios are computed from the hex values, not asserted. Light theme is the canonical MVP theme; dark mode is PLANNED and NOT IMPLEMENTED.

color.blue.50.description: Blue ramp step 50. Brand spine. 700 is the canonical primary. 50-200 are surfaces and selected backgrounds. 800-900 are pressed states and dark headers.
color.blue.50.intendedUsage: Brand spine. 700 is the canonical primary. 50-200 are surfaces and selected backgrounds. 800-900 are pressed states and dark headers.
prohibitedUsage: Never used directly by a component. Components reference semantic tokens only.
Never used as a foreground colour for text or icons.
color.blue.50.accessibilityNotes: Background role only. Foreground colour is chosen from the neutral or semantic text tokens and must meet its own target against this background.
